faq.title: Frequently
faq.desc: Answers to the most common questions.
faq.q1: How much does a web project cost?
faq.a1: It depends on complexity. A landing page starts at $500, a corporate site from $1,500, and a full app from $3,000. We always provide a free quote.
faq.q2: How long does it take to develop a website?
faq.a2: A landing page can be ready in 3-5 business days. A corporate site in 1-2 weeks. More complex projects may take 3-6 weeks.
faq.q3: Do you offer support after delivery?
faq.a3: Yes, support is included in all plans. You can get monthly maintenance from $147/month for updates, security, and monitoring.
faq.q4: Do you accept payments from Cuba?
faq.a4: Yes, we work with clients in Cuba and abroad. We accept transfers, cryptocurrencies, and other methods as needed.
